title: carduus nigrescens subsp. recurvatus
intro: Carduus nigrescens subsp. recurvatus, also known as the Dark-throated Plumeless Thistle, is a plant species belonging to the thistle family (Cirsium or Carduus). This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carduus nigrescens subsp. recurvatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
